title: Executive – Compliance
metaDescription: Executive – Compliance role on WTP Advisory's CDD team in Singapore: review KYC, perform customer risk rating and due diligence in line with AML/CFT requirements.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an Executive – Compliance to join our CDD team in Singapore.
duties: Advise the onboarding team on requirements in accordance with company AML/KYC standards and regulatory requirements, and partner with the onboarding team to meet these requirements.
Review and corroborate KYC information submitted by RMs, perform independent review, and risk rate customers in accordance with regulatory requirements as well as Group AML/CFT policy and procedures.
Follow up with RMs and other stakeholders on KYC-related matters and on escalated or prioritised cases.

Assess and ensure the relevance and completeness of KYC information supplied by onboarding teams and existing clients, and perform appropriate due diligence checks and information searches to comply with client onboarding standards.
Highlight deficiencies, suspicious AML, or other non-compliance issues to relevant parties and management.
requirements: In-depth understanding of Companies Act Cap 50 and ACRA Regulation.
4 – 5 years of relevant experience is required.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
